metadata.description: Professional code review skills for Claude Code — GitHub PRs and local code

plugins.name: github-pr-review
plugins.description: Professional GitHub PR reviews with position validation, JSON payload support, code suggestions, multi-agent parallel review, and user approval workflow

plugins.name: local-review
